{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Ruler binding
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Ruler binding]] stops shooting [[Lindon]] when it loses power.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] had to release the [[Ruler binding]] to avoid being killed.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
